description: Phase 4 sub-phase 4.1: rename pi-workflows `workflow` tool → `workflow-execute` (canonical naming alignment per pi-context verb-noun convention) + add workflow-resume pi tool (explicit-resume-by-runId complement to workflow-execute's auto-resume default). Closes TASK-024 directly (single-sub-phase phase).
acceptance_criteria: Pi tool name `workflow` renamed to `workflow-execute` at packages/pi-workflows/src/index.ts:494; parameters + execute body unchanged

New pi tool `workflow-resume` registered after workflow-execute; parameters: Type.Object({workflow: Type.String, runId: Type.String, input: Type.Optional(Type.Unknown)}); rejects when no incomplete run matches OR runId mismatch
Bare-string scan: `grep -wn '"workflow"' packages/pi-workflows/src/index.ts` returns only legitimate non-tool-name usages (params.workflow / error strings / JSDoc)
skill-narrative.md + README.md updated where tool-name references exist
Existing tests calling tool by name 'workflow' updated to 'workflow-execute'
New tests cover workflow-resume happy path + no-incomplete-run rejection + runId-mismatch rejection
Husky pre-commit gate (npm run check && npm test) green
Breaking change flagged with `!` in commit subject (tool name change affects any in-tree caller)
notes: CLOSED at HEAD 569eec4. workflow tool renamed to workflow-execute (index.ts:495); workflow-resume new tool registered (index.ts:575) with no-incomplete-run + runId-mismatch + cross-spec-incompat rejection paths. Tests: pi-workflows 824 to 829 (+5). See VER-014.
